name: Magic Initiate
description: You learn two cantrips and one 1st-level spell from the Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell list. You choose Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma as your spellcasting ability for these spells. You can cast the 1st-level spell once without a spell slot per long rest, and you can also cast it using any spell slots you have. Whenever you gain a level, you can replace one of these spells with another from the same list. You can take this feat multiple times, choosing a different spell list each time.
